channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Lawmakers launch investigation into 23andMe after bankruptcy
item.description: A group of House lawmakers launched a probe Thursday into 23andMe's handling of customers' sensitive data following the company's filing for bankruptcy last month. In a letter to 23andMe, House Commerce and Energy Committee Chair Brett Guthrie (R-Ky.) and Reps. Gus Bilirakis (R-Fla.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Roblox issued subpoena for potentially exposing children to graphic, harmful content
item.description: The attorney general expressed concern over the ability of predatory adults to freely send messages to minors.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, NewsNation

item.title: Google's digital ad network declared an illegal monopoly, joining its search engine in penalty box
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google has been branded an abusive monopolist by a federal judge for the second time in less than a year, this time for illegally exploiting some of its online marketing technology to boost the profits fueling an internet empire currently worth $1.8 trillion.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 10 most used gen AI tools in the enterprise
item.description: Generative AI has entered the enterprise in a big way since OpenAI first launched ChatGPT in 2022. According to Precedence Research, the global gen AI market was over $25 billion in 2024 and is forecast to reach a staggering $803 billion by 2033.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: GitHub CEO Advocates for Coding Education in Schools Amid AI Advancements
item.description: GitHub CEO Thomas Dohmke advocates for coding education despite the emergence of artificial intelligence, emphasizing the importance of human skills and continuous learning.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Tesla’s first quarter EV registrations slump 15.1% in California
item.description: Tesla‘s electric-vehicle registrations in California dropped 15.1% during the first quarter, industry data showed, signaling an accelerated decline and growing challenges for the Elon Musk-led automaker in its biggest U.S. market.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Tech shares fall after Nvidia says new US controls on exports of AI chip will cost it $5.5 billion
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Shares in computer chipmakers slumped Wednesday after Nvidia said tighter U.S. government controls on exports of computer chips used for artificial intelligence will cost it an extra $5.5 billion.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Don't like a columnist's opinion? Los Angeles Times offers an AI-generated opposing viewpoint
item.description: In a colorful commentary for the Los Angeles Times, Matt K. Lewis argued that callousness is a central feature of the second Trump administration, particularly its policies of deportation and bureaucratic cutbacks.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hello, Flipper! Google has developed a genAI model to talk to dolphins
item.description: Google has unveiled a new generative AI (genAI) model, Dolphin Gemma, which will attempt to decode how dolphins communicate with each other. Dolphins are among the most intelligent animals on the planet and communicate partly through whistles and calls.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: China pursuing 3 alleged US operatives over cyberattacks during Asian Games
item.description: TAIPEI, Taiwan (AP) — China said Tuesday it is pursuing three alleged U.S. operatives accused of carrying out cyberattacks on Chinese infrastructure during the Asian Games held in the city of Harbin in February. A notice from the Harbin police headquarters named them as Katheryn A. Wilson, Robert J.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER BODEEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg takes the stand in historic antitrust trial
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg took to the witness stand on the first day of a historic antitrust trial to defend his company against allegations it illegally monopolized the social media market.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN WITTE and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NAVWAR using Catapult to find SBIR technologies faster
item.description: Shadi Azoum, the NAVWAR’s program manager for the SBIR/STTR programs, said about 60% of their entire SBIR and STTR awards take advantage of Catapult. The post NAVWAR using Catapult to find SBIR technologies faster first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Meta says it will resume AI training with public content from European users
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Social media company Meta said Monday that it will start using publicly available content from European users to train its artificial intelligence models, resuming work put on hold last year after activists raised concerns about data privacy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As legacy of Ford fades in Brazil, China's BYD looks to extend global lead in EV sales
item.description: CAMACARI, Brazil (AP) — When Chinese automaker BYD Co. announced plans to build a massive factory in the hardscrabble city of Camacari, in Brazil’s northeastern Bahia state, locals saw a new beginning. After years of economic stagnation following Ford Motor Co.
item.dc:creator: FABIANO MAISONNAVE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Some top tech leaders have embraced Trump. That's created a political divide in Silicon Valley
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (AP) — Like many in the tech industry, Jeremy Lyons used to think of himself as a relatively apolitical guy.
item.dc:creator: NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Via porn, gore and ultra-violence, extremist groups are sinking hooks online into the very young
item.description: PARIS (AP) — After his arrest, the boy's mother was stunned to discover that her 12-year-old had been learning how to kill and gorging on videos of decapitation and torture so gruesome they made even case-hardened French court officials look away.
item.dc:creator: JOHN LEICESTER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Japanese leader says he hopes Osaka expo will help reunite a divided world
item.description: OSAKA, Japan (AP) — Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba, speaking at Saturday's opening ceremony for the Osaka expo, expressed his hope that the event will help restore global unity in a world plagued by conflicts and trade wars.
item.dc:creator: AYAKA McGILL and MARI YAMAGUCHI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Hackers find a way around built-in Windows protections
item.description: If not properly managed, Windows Defender Application Control, a security feature with Windows, could be a potential security vulnerability.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Social Security Administration 'will be using X to communicate' moving forward
item.description: The shift comes as communications staff at the agency has dwindled due to reassignments in front-facing roles at field offices across the country.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, WGN 9

item.title: Groundcover grows funding for eBPF-based observability tech
item.description: When Groundcover entered the observability market in 2021, it was already a mature market with established vendors.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Teen goes from 10 nightly seizures to zero with brain implant
item.description: The NeuroOne OneRF Ablation System is a new device with FDA-cleared technology designed for both diagnosing and treating neurological disorders in one procedure.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A multicloud experiment in agentic AI: Lessons learned
item.description: Recently I undertook a project to design and validate agentic AI architectures capable of operating autonomously across various public cloud providers.
item.dc:creator: Info World
